summary: A zero-feature, debt-only sprint dedicated to paying down structural debt identified in the Sprint 39 audits. Decomposes God Files across the database schema, API controllers, frontend components, and test suites. Introduces a Services layer for business logic, refactors naming patterns, and hardens the test architecture with dynamic auth mocking, E2E hydration guards, and telemetry isolation.

tasks.title: Modularize Monolithic API Test Suite
tasks.instructions:
Decompose the 22KB `apps/api/src/routes/v1/v1.test.ts` into domain-specific test files.
- Analyze the existing test file and identify all `describe` blocks by domain (clubs, teams, social, identity, media, etc.).
- Create domain-specific test files colocated with their controllers (e.g., `teams/clubs.test.ts`, `social/connections.test.ts`). Merge with any existing minimal test stubs.
- Each file must be fully self-contained with its own imports, `describe` block, and setup/teardown logic.
- Extract shared test fixtures (if any) into a shared `__test-utils__/` module.
- Reduce `v1.test.ts` to only cover the root health-check endpoint (`GET /api/v1`).
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/api test` to verify zero assertion regressions.

tasks.title: Introduce Backend Services Layer
tasks.instructions:
Create a new Services layer at `apps/api/src/services/` to decouple business logic from Hono controllers.
- Create `services/DmService.ts` — extract thread creation, parental CC injection, participant resolution, and message dispatch logic from `social/dms.ts` (24KB).
- Create `services/UserService.ts` — extract profile resolution, slug validation, onboarding checks, and push token management from `identity/users.ts` (23KB).
- Service functions must accept typed inputs and return typed outputs. No Hono context (`c`) objects inside services.
- Refactor `dms.ts` and `users.ts` controllers to be lean: (1) validate with Zod, (2) call service, (3) return response.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/api test` to verify all existing tests pass without modification.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` to verify type safety.

tasks.title: Decompose Media Controllers
tasks.instructions:
Decompose the `apps/api/src/routes/v1/media/videos.ts` (23KB) monolithic controller into domain-aligned sub-route files.
- Create or verify `media/upload.ts` — consolidate all upload logic (Direct Upload URL generation).
- Create `media/analysis.ts` — extract `POST /videos/:id/analyze` and AI tagging queue dispatch.
- Create `media/studio.ts` — extract smart crop, telestrator, and filter endpoints.
- Create `media/metadata.ts` — extract `GET /videos`, video listing, status queries, and caption updates.
- Update `media/index.ts` to compose sub-routers. All API paths must remain identical.
- Verify with `pnpm --filter @repo/api test` and `pnpm typecheck`.

tasks.title: Unified API Error Reporting
tasks.instructions:
Consolidate error reporting in the API by replacing all native `console.error` calls with the structured `@repo/shared` logger.
- Verify that a structured logger exists at `packages/shared/src/utils/logger.ts`. If not, create a minimal JSON-structured logger compatible with Cloudflare Workers.
- Find all `console.error` usages in `apps/api/src/` using grep.
- Replace each with `logger.error(message, context)` where context includes `route`, `userId` (when available), and the error object.
- Ensure all previously logged data is preserved in the structured format.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/api test` and `pnpm typecheck`.

tasks.title: Extract Mobile God Components
tasks.instructions:
Extract inline modals, bottom sheets, and complex state logic from mobile screen god-components.
- `LockerRoomScreen.tsx` (18KB): Extract `MediaPickerModal.tsx`, `UploadProgressSheet.tsx`, and `HighlightCard.tsx` into `src/components/locker-room/`. Create `hooks/useLockerRoom.ts`.
- `ComposePostScreen.tsx` (18KB): Extract `PostMediaAttacher.tsx`, `MentionSuggestions.tsx`, and `PostPreview.tsx` into `src/components/compose-post/`. Create `hooks/useComposePost.ts`.
- Screen files should be reduced by at least 30% in line count.
- Ensure no DOM elements (div, span, etc.) are used — React Native components only.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/mobile typecheck` to verify.

tasks.title: Decompose Database Schema God-Files
tasks.instructions:
Decompose the 32KB `packages/shared/src/db/schema/performance.ts` god-file into domain-aligned modules.
- Create `schema/scouting.ts` — extract `savedSearches`, `scoutTags`, `scoutNotes` tables and their relations.
- Create `schema/fitness.ts` — extract `workoutPrograms`, `workoutLogs`, `nutritionPlans`, `nutritionLogs` and their relations.
- Create `schema/gamification.ts` — extract `userBadges`, `trophies`, `leaderboardConfigs`, `h2hChallenges`, `h2hVotes`, `kudos` and their relations.
- Create `schema/evaluations.ts` — extract `evaluations`, `challenges`, `challengeEntries`, `accolades` and coaching-related relations.
- Create `schema/instructional.ts` — extract `instructionalVideos`, `videoBookmarks` and their relations.
- Update `schema/index.ts` barrel to re-export all new modules for backward compatibility.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/shared build` to verify the build.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` to verify all downstream workspaces compile correctly.

tasks.title: Extract Web Component Logic into Hooks
tasks.instructions:
Extract business logic from large web React components into dedicated custom hooks.
- `FamilyCenter.tsx` (20KB): Extract fetch operations and permission logic into `hooks/useFamilyPermissions.ts` and `hooks/useFamilyMembers.ts`. Extract `FamilyMemberCard.tsx` and `PermissionRequestModal.tsx` sub-components.
- `GlobalSearch.tsx` (19KB): Extract search logic into `hooks/useGlobalSearch.ts`. Extract `SearchResultGroup.tsx` and `SearchSuggestions.tsx`.
- `PrivacyDashboard.tsx` (18KB): Extract privacy settings into `hooks/usePrivacySettings.ts`. Extract `PrivacyFieldRow.tsx` and `DataVisibilityCard.tsx`.
- `EvaluationsHub.tsx` (18KB): Extract evaluation data into `hooks/useEvaluations.ts`. Extract `EvaluationCard.tsx` and `EvaluationDetailModal.tsx`.
- Hooks follow `use[Domain]` naming convention. Colocate in a `hooks/` directory adjacent to the component.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/web build` and `pnpm typecheck` to verify no regressions.

tasks.title: E2E Hydration & Race-Condition Hardening
tasks.instructions:
Audit and harden all Playwright E2E specs to eliminate flaky behavior caused by hydration races.
- Search for all `waitForTimeout` calls in `apps/web/e2e/` and replace with explicit guards: `page.waitForLoadState('networkidle')`, `page.waitForSelector('[data-testid="..."]', { state: 'visible' })`, or `page.waitForSelector('[data-hydrated]')`.
- For tests that depend on API responses, add network intercepts using `page.route()` to mock or wait for specific endpoints.
- For React island interactions, ensure tests wait for the `data-hydrated` attribute before clicking or asserting.
- Run the full E2E suite locally (`pnpm --filter @repo/web test:e2e`) to verify stability.
- Document the hydration guard pattern in a short README or code comment for future test authors.

tasks.title: Telemetry Isolation & Mocking Utility
tasks.instructions:
Create a centralized telemetry mocking utility to achieve 100% network isolation in E2E tests.
- Create `apps/web/e2e/utils/telemetry-mock.ts` with a `blockTelemetry(page)` function.
- The function must intercept and abort all outbound requests matching PostHog, Sentry, and internal analytics domains.
- Integrate the blocker into the Playwright global setup or `beforeEach` fixture so it applies to all specs automatically.
- Verify that no telemetry requests escape to external services during test runs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/web test:e2e` to verify zero regressions.

tasks.title: Decompose Identity Controllers
tasks.instructions:
Decompose the `apps/api/src/routes/v1/identity/users.ts` (23KB) monolithic controller into domain-aligned sub-route files.
- Create `identity/profile-management.ts` — extract `PATCH /users/me`, `PATCH /users/me/slug`, and avatar update logic.
- Create `identity/push-tokens.ts` — extract `PUT /users/push-token`.
- Create `identity/relationships.ts` — extract `POST /users/link` and parent-athlete relationship management.
- Create `identity/onboarding.ts` — extract onboarding interception and profile completion checks.
- Update `identity/index.ts` to compose sub-routers using `app.route()`. All API paths and response shapes must remain identical.
- Verify with `pnpm --filter @repo/api test` and `pnpm typecheck`.

tasks.title: Dynamic Clerk Auth Mocking for RBAC Tests
tasks.instructions:
Refactor the API Vitest setup to support dynamic JWT payload injection for RBAC testing at scale.
- Create `apps/api/src/__test-utils__/mockAuth.ts` with a `createMockAuth(payload)` utility that accepts dynamic claims (userId, clerkId, role, teamIds, clubIds, subscriptionTier).
- The utility must generate a mock auth context that can be injected into Hono's `c.set()` without requiring real Clerk JWT tokens.
- Retain the existing `MOCK_TOKEN_MAP` as convenience presets that delegate to `createMockAuth()`.
- Migrate at least 5 existing RBAC boundary tests to use the new dynamic pattern.
- Run `pnpm --filter @repo/api test` to verify zero regressions.

tasks.title: Global Semantic Naming Refactor
tasks.instructions:
Execute a monorepo-wide refactor of generic variable names to semantic, domain-relevant names.
- Search for all `const data = await res.json()` patterns in `apps/api/src/` and replace with domain-specific names (e.g., `clubDetails`, `rosterEntries`, `highlightMeta`).
- Search for `const data = await` patterns in `apps/web/src/` hooks and components and apply the same treatment.
- Ensure iteration variables are descriptive (e.g., `for (const connection of connectionList)` not `for (const item of data)`).
- Run `pnpm test` and `pnpm typecheck` to verify zero regressions.
